description_long: This guard rail consists of a diamond-patterned metal mesh panel supported by two vertical posts on either side. The mesh is tightly woven, creating a grid that is both visually open and physically restrictive, ideal for preventing passage while maintaining visibility. The posts appear to be solid and robust, likely made of steel, and are positioned at the ends of the mesh panel for structural stability. The mesh is slightly angled at the top, giving the rail a subtle trapezoidal profile. The entire structure is finished in a dark color, likely black, which is common for urban safety barriers. There are no visible reflective markings or additional safety features on the mesh or posts.
description: A black, diamond-patterned metal mesh guard rail with two sturdy vertical posts and a slightly angled top edge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full diamond mesh panel and both supporting posts.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the mesh and the thickness of the supporting post.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the mesh pattern and posts from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slimness of the mesh and the post's depth.
